meta.title: Find Your Way Around The S4 Big Party
meta.description: Wednesday night all of S4x25 heads to Sparkman Wharf for the S4 Big Party. There are three main parts: Splitsville, Lighthaus, and the Lawn. Check out the video so you don't miss anything.
